question.text: The passing score for NISM Series XV examination is:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The passing score is 60 marks out of 100 total marks. This applies to the combined score of MCQs and case-based questions. **The Trap:** 60% is the standard passing threshold for most NISM exams. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 15 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** With negative marking of 25%, accuracy matters more than attempting all questions. Score = Correct - (0.25 x Wrong).
